text: The department shall receive all records under Section 543.204 (Submission of Record Prohibited) (a) at its main office.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 543. Arrest & Prosecution of Violators
##### § 543.205 — Record Received at Main Office

The department shall receive all records under Section 543.204 (Submission of Record Prohibited) (a) at its main office.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department shall receive all records under Section 543.204 (Submission of Record Prohibited) (a) at its main office.
